segment_summary: This segment demonstrates the Dirty COW (CVE-2016-5195) exploit in a live demo. The speaker explains how the exploit uses `ptrace` system calls to patch the VSO (virtual dynamic shared object) and inject code, ultimately gaining root control of the host from within a container. He highlights the non-deterministic nature of the exploit and discusses how a modified AppArmor profile can block it, but stresses that the ultimate solution is to patch the kernel and run the latest software versions.
